package repository

import "context"

// AuditLogsRepository is a draft repository boundary for auditLogs.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type AuditLogsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query AuditLogsQuery) ([]AuditLog, error)
}

type AuditLogsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
